title: Template Registry
description: The canonical, static list of Template Registry descriptors — Phase 2B Batch PXP-5 (docs/44-PHASE-2B-TECHNICAL-PLAN.md §11/§11.5/§17/§22, ADR-016, docs/47-PHASE-2B-IMPLEMENTATION-RULES.md). Defines the doctor-authored question sets ('CheckInTemplate' rows) any patient-facing form or questionnaire is generated from, never hardcoded per form — complementing shared/constants/module-registry.json's separate 'which capability is exposed' concern (ADR-012). Seeded, in this batch, with exactly one template ('daily_wellness_checkin' v1), the registry's first concrete category ('template_category': 'daily_checkin'). See template-registry.md for the field-by-field explanation, the disclosed 'template_category' field this batch adds beyond docs/44 §11.2's literal field list, and which reserved fields are presently inert. apps-script/TemplateRegistry.gs hand-ports this list into its own Foundation-prefixed array, the same convention module-registry.json's own consumer already uses.

questions.label: How are you feeling today, overall?
Did you take your prescribed medication today?
Anything else your doctor should know? (optional)
